message:
fix(search): penalize unrefined documents in two-tier blended scoring

Previously, documents that were not refined by the quality tier kept
their full fast-search score in the blended result, which could rank
them above refined documents that legitimately scored well on quality.

Apply the (1.0 - weight) factor to unrefined documents, effectively
treating their missing quality score as 0.0.  This preserves their
relative ordering among themselves while correctly placing them below
high-quality refined items in the final ranking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
